questionHtml: State two photosynthetic pigments that could be identified using chromatography.
markschemeHtml:
chlorophyll
carotene
xanthophyll

Accept other valid pigments

Do not accept pigments named by colour

Award [1] for any two correct

Award [1] for chlorophyll a AND (chlorophyll) b

[Max 1 Mark]

meta.title: State two photosynthetic pigments that could be identified using chromatography.
